setup.title: Setup
setup.subtitle: Add referees and courts, then choose which courts run on each day.
setup.noReferees: No referees yet — add your roster.
setup.noCourts: No courts yet — add courts or import a schedule.

import.title: Import
import.instructions: Paste or upload a TSV or CSV match export.

generate.title: Generate schedule
generate.subtitle: Fill every match with a Head and Assistant referee.
generate.bentBanner: Generated with some fairness rules bent — see warnings.
generate.placeholder: Generation runs here in a later step.

review.title: Review
review.subtitle: Pin or override any slot — the grid edits the selected day.
review.empty: No matches yet — import a schedule to review.

export.title: Export
export.subtitle: Download a JSON backup or save to this browser's library.
export.printSubtitle: Print courtside sheets for the selected day.
export.noDay: No matches yet — import a schedule to print.

picker.tagline: Fair referee schedules for every beach tournament.

header.clean: No issues — every referee is balanced and rested.
header.cleanSub: Rest, balance, and pairing all within targets.
header.yellowOnly: Schedule looks good — a few minor fairness notes.
header.blocker: Solve blocked — fix this before generating.

run.budget: Generating stopped at the time limit — result may not be optimal. Generate again to keep improving.
run.cancelled: You stopped generating early — showing the best result so far. Generate again to continue.

blocker.tooManyDuties: Too many duties for the referees available at {time} — needs {demand}, have {available}. Add a referee or availability there.

hint.forcedRest: Not enough referees at {t1}–{t2} — add availability or a referee there.

rest.headline: Rest rule bent — {n} referee(s) working too long without a break

headBalance.headline: Head duties uneven — {n} referee(s) off target

asstBalance.headline: Assistant duties uneven — {n} referee(s) off target

minor.backToBack: {ref}: Head at {t1} then Head at {t2} — could alternate

library.title: Referees library
library.subtitle: Saved referee names, reused across tournaments. Add referees in a tournament's Setup; rename or remove them here.
library.empty: No saved referees yet — add referees in a tournament's Setup.
library.confirmDelete: Remove “{name}” from the library? Tournaments already using this referee keep their copy.
